message:
chore(beads): close bd-2wyur after fresh-eyes audit landed

Flush the JSONL audit trail for the "Fresh-eyes archaeology and bug
hunt" bead (`bd-2wyur`). The bead was in_progress while the audit
wave was walking the ffs-core / ffs-fuse / ffs-journal /
ffs-repair surface; the findings from that walk have landed as
separate commits earlier in this push (statfs GD aggregation,
JBD2 tag-format overhaul, IoctlTraceProbe fallback, evidence-ledger
poisoning, xattr proptest guard tightening, raid5 stripe-offset
fix, etc.). Close reason records that workspace-level gates
(`cargo fmt --check`, `cargo check --all-targets`, `cargo clippy
--all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo test`) all pass on the post-
fix tree.

Only the `status`, `updated_at`, `closed_at`, and `close_reason`
fields move for this bead. No other entries touched; no code,
no test, no doc change travels with this commit, matching the
agreed shape for `br sync --flush-only` JSONL checkpoints per the
AGENTS.md "br is non-invasive — it NEVER runs git commands
automatically" convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
